name: HUYA Inc.
description: HUYA Inc. operates game-live streaming platforms in the People's Republic of China. The company's platforms facilitate interaction between broadcasters and users, as well as offer live streaming of popular games, e-sports tournaments, and other entertainment content. It also provides talent agency services, and operates community and other applications. HUYA Inc. was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.
